capabilities.name: Carrier rate shopping
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: list_shipping_options(800g,SEK) live via MCP gateway → 2 carriers compared, sorted by price (PostNord 4900 / DHL 5900); place_order auto-selects cheapest matching carrier (verified order 3ccaa76e: 3000g → DHL Paket 1-5kg 8900, total 44900 = items+shipping). UI: CheckoutPage delivery selector lists all carrier options via the same RPC, cheapest pre-selected.
capabilities.notes: list_shipping_options RPC (destination-aware since 2026-07-07 migration) + list_shipping_options skill + place_order shipping wiring (Lovable commit c6089265). Closes OpenClaw finding e50f0784.

capabilities.name: Weight-based rate calc
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_shipping_rate create live (Standard 0-1kg → rate_id) + calc_shipping_rate(PostNord,800g)→4900. UI: Shipping Rates section + rate calculator in ShippingPage (commit 66d1b018).
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-13; admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: International/customs handling
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. manage_shipment_customs RPC/skill: customs columns on shipments (value/currency/incoterm/contents_type/destination_country/items) + CN22-style declaration generation with completeness validation (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: set NO destination + HS-coded items, declare → CN22 payload with items_total 39600.

capabilities.name: Dimensional weight
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: calc_shipping_rate with dims live (2000g @40x30x20 → dimensional_grams 4800, billed_on dimensional). UI: rate calculator shows billed_on actual|dimensional in ShippingPage.
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-13; surfaced in the Shipping Rates calculator 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Address validation
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. validate_address RPC/skill + postal_code_rules reference table (16 countries seeded): required fields + per-country postal regex, normalized output (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: '114 55' SE valid; '1145' rejected with format hint.

capabilities.name: Delivery-date estimation
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. estimate_delivery_date RPC/skill (migration 20260708010000): next-business-day ship date + carriers.transit_days_min/max counted in business days (weekends + business_holidays skipped). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: Fri 2026-07-10 ship → earliest Mon 07-13, latest Wed 07-15.
capabilities.notes: Transit windows per carrier (manage_carrier); shares the business_holidays calendar with SLA.

capabilities.name: Carrier pickup scheduling
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. shipping_pickups table + manage_carrier_pickup RPC/skill (request/assign_shipments/update_status/cancel/get/list; migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: pickup requested (PostNord, 09:00–12:00 window) with 1 shipment attached.
capabilities.notes: Status flow requested → confirmed (confirmation_ref) → completed; cancel detaches parcels.

capabilities.name: Proof of delivery
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. record_delivery_proof RPC/skill: pod_signature_url/pod_signed_by/pod_signed_at/pod_photo_urls/pod_notes columns, sets shipment delivered and bubbles orders.fulfillment_status=delivered when all outbound parcels delivered (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: signed_by + photo recorded, order_marked_delivered=true.

capabilities.name: Multi-carrier failover
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. select_shipping_carrier RPC/skill: preferred carrier first, then failover through active carriers by carriers.priority until a matching rate; returns fallback_used + attempted[] (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: DHL preferred chosen at 800g; 9999999g → no_carrier_available with both carriers attempted.

capabilities.name: Return shipping labels
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. create_return_label RPC/skill: kind=return shipment linked via return_of_shipment_id, RET- tracking number rendered through the carrier tracking template, label payload (customer→merchant) stored in metadata.return_label (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: RET-8550E945AE created off the test shipment.
capabilities.notes: Label PDF generation stays delegated per carrier, same as outbound labels.

capabilities.name: Batch label printing
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. batch_shipping_labels RPC/skill: print-queue collection (default pending/labeled), returns labels[] + missing_label_shipment_ids (migration 20260708010000). Stage-3 live 2026-07-07: returned the return-label parcel, empty missing list.
